ground_truth.title: Insurance - Premium Car Rental Protection | American Express US
ground_truth.main_content: Premium Car Rental Protection - Receive up to $75,000 or $100,000, depending on selected plan, of theft or damage primary coverage when you enroll in Premium Car Rental Protection with an Eligible Card. Learn More Today.
